title: An Act relative to a town-wide ban on the use of second-generation anticoagulant rodenticides (SGARs)

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Gordon of Bedford, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4917) of Kenneth I. Gordon (by vote of the town) relative to banning the use of second-generation anticoagulant rodenticides in the town of Bedford.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
the committee on Environment and Natural Resources
